data.content_ref:
inline:# Design specification

This single-document website follows the adjudicated product plan. The harness assigned component identifiers and integration order; the following model-authored local values remain criticizable.

## Required-design synopsis
- Layout: one responsive scrolling page in order C1 → C2 → C3 → C4 → C5 → C6.
- Visual system: palette Deep space obsidian (#0A0A12) background; Neon Cyan (#00F2FF) and Electric Magenta (#FF00E5) for complementary base pair; typography Headings: Geometric Sans-Serif (e.g., Montserrat) with wide tracking; Body: High-legibility Mono (e.g., JetBrains Mono) ; spacing Modular 8px grid; expansive whitespace between conceptual sections (120px+); tight, precision-based padding (16px) withi.
- Components: C1 Header and introductory workshop branding.; C2 Interactive Sequence Builder for nucleotide base pairing.; C3 Step-through Process Simulator for RNA polymerase motion.; C4 Side-by-side DNA and mRNA Comparison View.; C5 High-detail Zoom-In viewer for hydrogen bonding.; C6 Educational Glossary for key genomic terminology..
- Interaction and state: Default: Subtle pulsing glow on interactive nodes; Hover: High-contrast highlight with scale-up (1.05x); Active: Haptic-style snap-in animation with color flash; Disabled: Desaturated grayscale with 50% opacity..
- Responsive behavior: Fluid scale; workbench tools stack vertically on mobile; interactive DNA strands shift from horizontal scrolls to vertical reels; zoom-in interactions transition from hover-magnification to full-screen modal views..
- Motion behavior: Organic fluid dynamics for molecular movement; elastic snapping for nucleotide pairing; smooth, decelerating eases (cubic-bezier 0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for enzyme traversal; parallax-dr.
- Reduced-motion behavior: All parallax and fluid animations replaced by instant state transitions; 'Simulation' button switches to a manual 'Next/Prev' frame toggle; pulsing glows replaced by static high-contrast borders..
- Static alternative: Flat layout with fixed-position workbench; simulations replaced by a series of labeled static diagrams (Before/After); interaction-based reveals replaced by expanded accordion panels..

## Page layout
One responsive scrolling page in this order: C1 → C2 → C3 → C4 → C5 → C6.

## Component inventory
- C1: Header and introductory workshop branding.. Requirements: Workshop branding title; Introductory heading; Visual anchor for the DNA theme. Dependencies: none. Motion: full.
- C2: Interactive Sequence Builder for nucleotide base pairing.. Requirements: Nucleotide base pairing logic (A-T, C-G); Interactive drag-and-drop or selection interface; Visual feedback for correct/incorrect pairings; Sequence input/output display. Dependencies: none. Motion: full.
- C3: Step-through Process Simulator for RNA polymerase motion.. Requirements: Visual representation of RNA polymerase enzyme; Step-by-step animation of transcription process; Dynamic mRNA strand elongation; DNA template strand unzipping visual; Step-through control interface (Next/Prev/Reset). Dependencies: none. Motion: full.
- C4: Side-by-side DNA and mRNA Comparison View.. Requirements: Parallel visual representation of DNA and mRNA strands; Highlighting of base pair differences (Thymine vs Uracil); Visual linkage between complementary sequences; Comparison labels for coding vs non-coding strands. Dependencies: none. Motion: full.
- C5: High-detail Zoom-In viewer for hydrogen bonding.. Requirements: High-resolution visualization of hydrogen bonds; Detailed nucleotide base pairing (A-T, G-C); Chemical bond annotations. Dependencies: none. Motion: full.
- C6: Educational Glossary for key genomic terminology.. Requirements: Genomic terminology definitions; Cross-references to molecular processes; Search or filter functionality for terms. Dependencies: none. Motion: limited.

## Visual direction
- palette: Deep space obsidian (#0A0A12) background; Neon Cyan (#00F2FF) and Electric Magenta (#FF00E5) for complementary base pairs; Bioluminescent Lime (#BFFF00) for enzymes; Frosted Glass white (#FFFFFF1A) for UI overlays.
- typography: Headings: Geometric Sans-Serif (e.g., Montserrat) with wide tracking; Body: High-legibility Mono (e.g., JetBrains Mono) for a technical, sequenced feel; Accent: Italicized Serif for scientific annotations.
- spacing strategy: Modular 8px grid; expansive whitespace between conceptual sections (120px+); tight, precision-based padding (16px) within tool-workbench modules to evoke a lab instrument aesthetic.
- responsive strategy: Fluid scale; workbench tools stack vertically on mobile; interactive DNA strands shift from horizontal scrolls to vertical reels; zoom-in interactions transition from hover-magnification to full-screen modal views.
- interaction state model: Default: Subtle pulsing glow on interactive nodes; Hover: High-contrast highlight with scale-up (1.05x); Active: Haptic-style snap-in animation with color flash; Disabled: Desaturated grayscale with 50% opacity.
- motion language: Organic fluid dynamics for molecular movement; elastic snapping for nucleotide pairing; smooth, decelerating eases (cubic-bezier 0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for enzyme traversal; parallax-driven depth layers.
- scroll narrative: Linear progression from macroscopic helix to microscopic base-pairs; scroll-triggered 'unzipping' of the DNA strand as the user descends; sticky-positioning for the Glossary as the user navigates the workbench.
- depth structure: Z-axis layering: Background (Deep Space) -> Midground (Parallax DNA strands) -> Foreground (Glassmorphic UI panels) -> Top-layer (Active tooltips and drag-and-drop elements).
- transition grammar: Cross-fades for state changes; slide-and-fade for instructional panels; orbit-based rotations for the 3D helix elements; seamless morphing between DNA and mRNA visualization states.
- texture language: Micro-grain noise for organic depth; subtle Gaussian blur on background 'bokeh' nucleotides; sharp, vector-perfect lines for chemical bonds; semi-transparent frosted glass with 10px backdrop-filter.
- reduced motion version: All parallax and fluid animations replaced by instant state transitions; 'Simulation' button switches to a manual 'Next/Prev' frame toggle; pulsing glows replaced by static high-contrast borders.
- static fallback: Flat layout with fixed-position workbench; simulations replaced by a series of labeled static diagrams (Before/After); interaction-based reveals replaced by expanded accordion panels.

## Interaction, state, and responsive strategy
Each component owns its declared DOM root and lifecycle exports. The page is assembled in manifest order as one responsive local document. Motion follows the shared art direction; reduced-motion and static modes preserve the complete narrative without requiring animation or JavaScript-only content.

```manifest
{
  "architecture": "single-document",
  "art_direction": {
    "depth_structure": "Z-axis layering: Background (Deep Space) -> Midground (Parallax DNA strands) -> Foreground (Glassmorphic UI panels) -> Top-layer (Active tooltips and drag-and-drop elements).",
    "motion_language": "Organic fluid dynamics for molecular movement; elastic snapping for nucleotide pairing; smooth, decelerating eases (cubic-bezier 0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for enzyme traversal; parallax-driven depth layers.",
    "reduced_motion_version": "All parallax and fluid animations replaced by instant state transitions; 'Simulation' button switches to a manual 'Next/Prev' frame toggle; pulsing glows replaced by static high-contrast borders.",
    "scroll_narrative": "Linear progression from macroscopic helix to microscopic base-pairs; scroll-triggered 'unzipping' of the DNA strand as the user descends; sticky-positioning for the Glossary as the user navigates the workbench.",
    "static_fallback": "Flat layout with fixed-position workbench; simulations replaced by a series of labeled static diagrams (Before/After); interaction-based reveals replaced by expanded accordion panels.",
    "texture_language": "Micro-grain noise for organic depth; subtle Gaussian blur on background 'bokeh' nucleotides; sharp, vector-perfect lines for chemical bonds; semi-transparent frosted glass with 10px backdrop-filter.",
    "transition_grammar": "Cross-fades for state changes; slide-and-fade for instructional panels; orbit-based rotations for the 3D helix elements; seamless morphing between DNA and mRNA visualization states."
  },
  "components": [
    {
      "css_prefix": "c1-",
      "element_id": "header-root",
      "events_emitted": [],
      "events_listened": [],
      "js_exports": [
        "c1_initializeHeaderAnimation",
        "c1_mount",
        "c1_destroy"
      ],
      "js_uses": [],
      "libs": [],
      "lifecycle": {
        "animated": true,
        "cleanup": "c1_destroy",
        "context_loss": null,
        "frame_loop_owner": "component",
        "initializer": "c1_mount",
        "pixel_ratio_cap": null,
        "static_fallback": "Flat layout with fixed-position workbench; simulations replaced by a series of labeled static diagrams (Before/After); interaction-based reveals replaced by expanded accordion panels.",
        "webgl_canvas_id": null
      },
      "max_chars": null,
      "name": "c1",
      "order": 0,
      "purpose": "Header and introductory workshop branding. Requirements: Workshop branding title; Introductory heading; Visual anchor for the DNA theme",
      "runtime_imports": []

Requirements: Visual representation of RNA polymerase enzyme; Step-by-step animation of transcription process; Dynamic mRNA strand elongation; DNA template strand unzipping visual; Step-through control interface (Next/Prev/Reset)",
